ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to JAN-15-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Continued To Jul-25-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Mtn To Require That A Pltf Post A Bond
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DAN LEE AND PHOENIX RABBIT, LLC'S Motion To Require That Plaintiff Post A Bond is Granted. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Advanced From Feb-14-12 To Jan-27-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
Off Calendar Jan-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAN LEE, PHOENIX RABBIT'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS.
Appearances: Paul F. Utrecht (425.3373) for plaintiff and responding party; Mark W. Epstein of Seiler Epstein Ziegler & Applegate, LLP (979.0500) for defendants and moving parties.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Plaintiff failed to show by a preponderance of the evidence the probable validity of a real property claim. Defendants are awarded reasonable attorney's fees in the amount of $5625. Plaintiff's objections are sustained. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
